messages.content: Build a tiny counter web app in index.html, style.css, app.js.

I'll create the tiny counter web app with the required files directly in the workspace root. Let me build these three files:

1. index.html - The main HTML structure
2. style.css - Basic styling for the UI
3. app.js - The counter logic and event handlers

Let me create these files now:
Update the existing app so the counter starts at 5 and add a reset button if it is missing. Modify existing files instead of recreating the project.
